name: grad-business-ecosystems
description: Apply Moore's business ecosystem framework to analyze how firms co-evolve through four stages (birth, expansion, authority, renewal) and occupy different ecosystem roles. Use this skill when the user needs to map ecosystem dynamics in a platform or industry, evaluate keystone vs dominator strategies, assess ecosystem health, or when they ask 'what stage is this ecosystem in', 'how should we position in this ecosystem', or 'why is this ecosystem declining despite having a dominant player'.
